summary: Pass cleanDomain and cookiePath as sys.argv to the pycookiecheat helper instead of fmt.Sprintf-interpolating them into the Python script string.
reason: A Chrome profile directory whose name contains a double-quote character could break out of the inline string literal and execute arbitrary Python on Linux/macOS (extractViaPycookiecheat). Although Chrome itself never creates such names, discoverChromeProfiles will pick up any directory with a Preferences + Cookies layout. Switching to sys.argv removes the interpolation entirely and closes the injection class.
